public_source_evidence: GEO sample titles use Bulk 1-Bulk 56 and publication Supplementary Table 1 lists these as Cohort 3, Bulk RNA-seq. GEO reports 56 bulk RNA-seq colon-biopsy samples; publication reports HC n=8, active CD n=22, active UC n=26.
overlap_result: Resolved as no public evidence of shared subjects/samples with DS017 or DS018. Supplementary Table 1 separates bulk RNA-seq as Cohort 3, distinct from Cohort 1 scRNA-seq and Cohort 2 CosMx SMI.
recommended_overlap_notes: Bulk RNA-seq arm of the Nat Commun 2023 macrophage/neutrophil IBD study. Public GEO titles and Supplementary Table 1 identify DS004/GSE235236 as Cohort 3 with Bulk 1-Bulk 56 samples, separate from DS017 scRNA-seq Cohort 1 and DS018 CosMx Cohort 2. Count as an independent cohort row within the shared study family; do not merge sample counts with DS017/DS018 as paired samples.
manual_review_notes: No subject-level reusable participant IDs are exposed, but the public supplement explicitly separates the modality arms into different cohorts; no sample-level overlap was found.

public_source_evidence: GEO sample titles use HC 1-HC 6, UC 1-UC 6, CD 1-CD 6 for scRNA-seq. Publication Supplementary Table 1 lists these as Cohort 1, scRNA-seq, and Fig. 1 reports 18 colonic samples.
overlap_result: Resolved as no public evidence of shared subjects/samples with DS004 or DS018. Supplementary Table 1 separates scRNA-seq as Cohort 1, distinct from bulk Cohort 3 and CosMx Cohort 2.
recommended_overlap_notes: scRNA-seq arm of the Nat Commun 2023 macrophage/neutrophil IBD study. Public GEO titles and Supplementary Table 1 identify DS017/GSE214695 as Cohort 1 with HC 1-HC 6, UC 1-UC 6, and CD 1-CD 6 colonic mucosa samples, separate from DS004 bulk RNA-seq Cohort 3 and DS018 CosMx Cohort 2. Count as an independent cohort row within the shared study family.
manual_review_notes: No subject-level reusable participant IDs are exposed, but the public supplement explicitly separates this scRNA-seq cohort from the spatial and bulk cohorts.

public_source_evidence: GEO sample titles use HC a-HC c, UC a-UC c, CD a-CD c. Publication Supplementary Table 1 lists these as Cohort 2, Spatial Molecular Imaging/CosMx, using surgical resection pieces; Fig. 1 reports 9 CosMx samples.
overlap_result: Resolved as no public evidence of shared subjects/samples with DS004 or DS017. Supplementary Table 1 separates CosMx SMI as Cohort 2, distinct from scRNA-seq Cohort 1 and bulk Cohort 3.
recommended_overlap_notes: CosMx spatial transcriptomics arm of the Nat Commun 2023 macrophage/neutrophil IBD study. Public GEO titles and Supplementary Table 1 identify DS018/GSE234713 as Cohort 2 with HC a-HC c, UC a-UC c, and CD a-CD c FFPE/surgical-resection samples, separate from DS017 scRNA-seq Cohort 1 and DS004 bulk RNA-seq Cohort 3. Count as an independent cohort row within the shared study family.
manual_review_notes: No subject-level reusable participant IDs are exposed, but the public supplement explicitly separates the CosMx cohort from the scRNA-seq and bulk RNA-seq cohorts.
